items.title: GoreBox Game Owner ‘Heartbroken’ by Philippine School Shooting
items.description: The developer of an online game that was banned by the Philippines after a deadly school shooting said he was “heartbroken” by the incident, pledging to cooperate with authorities in Manila.

items.title_en: GoreBox Game Owner ‘Heartbroken’ by Philippine School Shooting
